name: AINumbers Helm
description: Local-first control-plane daemon (helmd) that runs deterministic, hash-anchored OpenChainGraph (OCG) kernels vendored from the AINumbers estate — no data leaves the machine unless the user explicitly connects a provider. Produces Committee-Pack-ready evidence bundles (DSSE/RFC3161-signed) from bank-legible workflows.

extensions.description: Executes OpenChainGraph-conformant kernels vendored pinned from the AINumbers estate (see hub/vendored/ocg/MANIFEST.json in this repo). Kernel source-of-truth and full catalog live in the AINumbers site repo.

notes: This card describes helmd, a daemon that binds to 127.0.0.1 only — the `url` above is a loopback address, not a publicly reachable endpoint. There is one instance per installation; nothing here is centrally hosted.
REST + SSE route table: see docs/openapi.json in this repo (generated from hub/server.mjs — scripts/gen-openapi.mjs).
Every request requires Host/Origin match plus a pairing-issued Bearer token (D8 hardening) — see README.md.

skills.name: Committee Pack export
skills.description: Run a workflow template against connected data and export a Committee-Pack-ready PDF/pptx: outcome banner, process map, decision table, and a collapsible full-DAG/hash/DSSE appendix.

skills.name: OCG kernel catalog
skills.description: Deterministic kernel library (fraud, compliance, treasury, ESG, DLT, and more) vendored pinned from the AINumbers OpenChainGraph estate, executed locally with SHA-256 execution-hash receipts.
